event.description:
Big AI models need big I/O. If your storage can’t keep up, your GPUs are bad investments. Legacy systems choke on modern training and inferencing workloads—and that’s burning time, money, and opportunity. AI is a journey; whether you are on the AI lite side with cloud or the AI heavy side with in-house compute - we've got you covered!

In this session, we’ll call out why your current infrastructure is failing AI and discuss how next-gen tech—like blazing-fast NVMe arrays, IBM Ceph’s scale-out muscle, and IBM's Openshift based Fusion Hyper-converged container-native brains—are built to feed the beast. Stop starving your GPUs.

Join us and discover how to Kill the bottlenecks & crush the pipeline. Let’s go!

Details and RSVP: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/ai-infrastructure-that-doesnt-suck-tickets-1571172321709

group.name: Data, Cloud and AI in NYC

event.title: [EXTERNAL] AI Infrastructure That Doesn’t Suck
